title: Correlation between Cardiovascular Risk Factors and TCM Constitutions in 400 Patients with Atherosclerosis in Guangzhou City
abstract: Objective To study the distribution of traditional Chinese medicine (TCM) constitutions and the correlation between TCM constitutions and cardiovascular risk factors in patients with atherosclerosis in Guangzhou,to provide the theoretical basis for early intervention of arteriosclerosis through TCM.Methods The TCM constitutions and clinical information of 400 patients with arteriosclerosis in Guangzhou were collected by questionnaire investigation,and the distribution of TCM constitutions and the correlation between TCM constitutions and cardiovascular risk factors were analyzed.Results The main TCM constitution in patients with atherosclerosis was phlegm-dampness constitution (23.0％),22.0％ with blood stasis constitution,15.0％ with qi-deficiency constitution,13.5％ with damp-heat constitution and,11.5％ with yang-deficiency constitution.There were significant differences in the levels of uric acid,triglyceride.and high-density lipoprotein-cholesterol between the patients with qi-deficiency,damp-heat,phlegmdampness and blood-stasis constitution (P ＜0.05).Smoking,alcohol consumption were significantly correlated with qi-deficiency constitution(P ＜0.05).Smoking,alcohol consumption and hypertension were significantly correlated with damp-heat constitution (P ＜0.05).Men,smoking,lack of exercise,overweight/obese,hypertension were significantly correlated with the phlegm-dampness constitution (P ＜0.05).Hyperuricemia and dyslipidemia were significantly correlated with blood stasis constitution (P ＜0.05).The Binary Logistic regression analysis was used to analyze correlation between TCM constitutions and cardiovascular risk factors.The results showed that smoking and alcohol consumption may be risk factors of damp-heat constitution,while males,lack of exercise,overweight or obesity may be risk factors of phlegm-dampness constitution.Conclusion Phlegm-dampness,blood-stasis,qi-deficiency,and blood-stasis constitution are the main risk factors of atherosclerosis.The correlations of different TCM constitutions and cardiovascular risk factors are different.

title: Relationship Between Blood Stasis Type, Dampness Heat Type, Harmony Tpye and Cardiovascular Risk Factors In Middle Aged and Elderly People In Guangzhou
abstract: Objective:To explore the relationship between constitution of stagnant blood、constitution of damp-heat、constitution of yin-yang harmony and blood pressure (BP) 、uric acid (UA) 、fasting plasma glucose (FPG) 、total cholesterol (TC)、triglycerides (TG)、high density lipoprotein (HDL)、low density lipoprotein (LDL)、body mass index (BMI),investigate the differences of cardiovascular risk factors based on constitution of TCM in Guangzhou area.Methods:Reviewed the elderly population in Guangzhou area whose constitution of TCM were that mentioned above,the difference of BP、UA、TC、TG、HDL、LDL、BMI、hyperlipidemia (HPL) 、hyperuricemia (HUA) 、overweight/obesity between constitution of stagnant blood、constitution of damp-heat、constitution of Yin-yang harmony were evaluated.Results:The levels of age、TC、UA、BMI and prevalence of HUA 、overweight/obesity of people in the constitution of stagnant blood were significantly higher than those in the constitution of yin-yang harmony.The levels of TC、UA and prevalence of HUA of people in the constitution of damp-heat were significantly higher than than those in the constitution of yin-yang harmony.Conclusions:In Guangzhou area,the people with constitution of stagnant blood constitution were susceptible to the elderly,overweight / obesity,high cholesterol,high uric acid,and those with constitution of damp-heat were susceptible to high cholesterol and high uric acid,suggesting that the prevention of cardiovascular disease could be taked based on the constitution of TCM.

title: The Constitution Distribution of Angina Pectoris Patients in Lingnan Area
abstract: Objective To research the constitution distribution of patients with angina pectoris and its correlation with highsensitivity C-reactive protein(hs-CRP),low-density lipoprotein cholesterol(LDL-C)and total cholesterol(TC).Methods Eighty nine angina pectoris patients and 10healthy volunteers lived in Lingnan area Guangdong Province were observed based on their constitution in Chinese medicine.The levels of hs-CRP,LDL-C and TC were detected and contrasted.Results The most common constitution types of angina pectoris patients are constitution of blood stasis(34.83%),phlegm-damp(22.47%) and damp-heat(20.23%).Comparing the control group,there were significant differences between patients and healthy volunteers with different constitution in hs-CRP level,LDL-C and TC(P<0.01).The levels of hs-CRP,LDL-C and TC were significantly increased in the patients with constitution of damp-heat,phlegm-damp and blood stasis(P<0.05).Conclusion People with constitution of damp-heat,phlegm-damp and blood stasis in Lingnan area are more likely to suffer from angina pectoris.The elevation of hs-CRP,LDL-C and TC is closely related to angina pectoris patients with constitution of damp-heat,phlegm-damp and blood stasis.

title: Study on the Relationships between TCM Constitution Types and Related Metabolic Indexes of Patients with Metabolic Syndrome
abstract: Objective:To study the relationships between TCM constitution types and related metabolic indexes of patients with metabolic syndrome,in order to provide an objective basis for TCM constitution interventions,improvement of biased constitution,and recovery of the health of individuals.Methods:By means of a cross-sectional study to collect of data and indexes of patients with metabolic syndrome;in accordance with "TCM Constitution Scale" to judge the constitution types and observe their distributions;by descriptive analysis,Logistic regression analysis etc.statistical methods,to analyze the relationships between the distribution law of TCM constitution and its related metabolic indexes.Results:Biased constitutions were in majority,the order of biased constitutions were respectively complex constitution,phlegmdamp,damp-heat,blood-stasis,qi-deficiency,yang- insufficiency,qi-stagnation,yin-deficiency,special innate.qi-stagnation,yin-deficiency,special innate.Among them,in complex constitution,phlegm-damp with blood-stasis was taken as main.The results of Logistic regression analysis showed that diastolic blood pressure is a protective factor of moderate constitution,BMI is a risk factor of phlegm-damp constitution,HDL is the protective factor of phlegm-damp constitution,diastolic blood pressure is a risk factor of damp-heat constitution,systolic blood pressure and LDL are risk factors of blood-stasis constitution,BMI and diastolic blood pressure are protective factors of blood-stasis constitution.Conclusions:phlegm-damp,damp-heat,blood-stasis are main biased constitutions of patients with metabolic syndrome;to prompt:HDL,LDL,BMI,diastolic blood pressure,systolic blood pressure etc.indexes are closely related to the improvement of constitution of patients with MS and the recovery of healthful physiological state.

title: Correlation between Cardiovascular Health Indexes and Chinese Medicine Constitution Types
abstract: Objective To explore the correlation between cardiovascular health indexes and Chinese medicine constitution types.Methods Cross-sectional study was adopted.All participants in the health examination were included as the study subjects in Xiangya Third Hospital of Central South University from June 1 st,2015 to June 30th,2017.A questionnaire survey was made based on the "self-test health examination scale".Blood pressure was measured.Body Mass Index (BMI) was calculated.Total cholesterol (TC) and fasting blood-glucose (FBG) were detected.Seven cardiovascular health indexes including 4 health behaviors (smoking status,BMI,physical exercise and healthy diet) and 3 health factors (blood pressure,TC and FBG) were investigated.Chinese medicine constitution differentiation was made.The correlation between cardiovascular health indexes and Chinese medicine constitution types was analyzed.Results Totally,3056 cases were included in the study.The difference of 7 cardiovascular health indexes in different age and gender,as well as the difference of Chinese medicine constitution types was significant (P ＜ 0.05).Qi deficiency constitution seemed to relate to physical exercise and BMI.Yang deficiency constitution seemed to relate to smoking,physical exercise,BMI,FBG and diet.Yin deficiency constitution seemed to relate to blood pressure.Blood stasis constitution seemed to relate to smoking,physical exercise and blood pressure.Phlegm-dampness constitution seemed to relate to physical exercise,blood pressure,BMI,FBG and diet.Dampnessheat constitution seemed to relate to physical exercise and diet.Qi stagnation constitution seemed to relate to smoking and physical exercise.Conclusion Cardiovascular health indexes seemed to correlate to Chinese medicine constitution types.According to population Chinese medicine constitution types,adopting aiming vascular health factors and behavioral intervention might help control cardiovascular diseases.

title: Correlation Analysis of TCM constitution, blood lipid and body mass index in metabolic hypertension
abstract: Objective To explore the correlation among different constitutions of traditional Chinese medicine (TCM), blood pressure and blood lipid metabolism in metabolic hypertension.Methods 398 patients form physical examination center of Longhua Hospital affiliated to Shanghai University of Traditional Chinese Medicine were selected to classify into different TCM constitutions, analyzed the relationship among TCM constitution, blood pressure, body mass index (BMI) and blood lipid metabolism.Enumeration data was analyzed by Spearman rank correlation analysis,measurement data which accorded with the normal distribution was analyzed by One-way-ANOVA,and the other measurement data didn't accord with the normal distribution was analyzed by chi-square test.Results There was no statistical difference on the correlation between TCM constitution and BMI (P>0.05).The constitution of phlegm-dampness had negative correlation with systolic blood pressure (P<0.05).The normal constitution had positive correlation with diastolic blood pressure (P<0.05).The normal constitution had negative correlation with the cholesterol and high density lipoprotein (HDL) (P<0.05).The diastolic blood pressure had negative correlation with HDL (P<0.05).The systolic blood pressure and diastolic blood pressure had positive correlation with triglyceride in constitution of yin-deficiency and constitution of damp-heat (P<0.05).Conclusion The constitution of phlegm-dampness and normal constitution may be the influence factors of metabolic hypertension.The triglyceride and HDL may be risk factors of metabolic hypertension, and which in the people of constitutions of yin-deficiency and damp-heat are more prominent.

title: DYSLIPIDEMIA AND TCM CONSTITUTION TYPE: A CORRELATION STUDY
abstract: Objective To investigate the correlation between dyslipidemia and TCM constitution type.Methods From people who came for medical examination,986 were selected and divided into group A (normal blood lipid group,n =402)and group B (abnormal blood lipid group,n =584).Sex,age and body mass index (BMI) between the two groups were compared.Logistic regression analysis was done regarding correlation between abnormal blood lipid and TCM constitution type.Results The differences in gender,age and BMI between the two groups were significant (x2 =15.592,Z=4.148,t =9.588,P＞0.05).Logistic regression analysis showed that Qi-deficiency constitution (OR=0.100,95％CI=0.014-0.693,P＞0.05) and Qi depression constitution (OR =0.208,95 ％CI =0.042-1.037,P＜0.05)entered the regression equation,which were main influencing factors of abnormal blood lipid.Conclusion Patients with dyslipidemia are more common in men of 40-60 years old,their BMI is higher than normal lipid group.In TCM,damp-heat constitution group has the highest incidence of dyslipidemia,followed by phlegmdampness constitution.Qi-deficiency constitution and Qi-depression constitution may be the risk factors of dyslipidemia.

title: Constitution Factors for Metabolic Syndrome: A Case-control Study
abstract: Objective To investigate the constitution factors for metabolic syndrome(MS). Methods 271 MS cases and 271 non-MS controls were selected. They were assessed according to the diagnosis standard of constitution of TCM. Results Multiple logistic regression analysis revealed that phlegm-dampness constitution and dampness-heat constitution were dangerous factors for MS, normal constitution was protective factor for MS (P0.05). Conclusion Research on constitution play a role in investigating pathogenesis of MS.

title: Metabolism and characteristics of acupoint measurement by conductance method among damp heat and phlegm humid people
abstract: Objective To investigate the metabolism and the characteristics of acupoint measurement by conduct -ance method among damp heat and phlegm humid people.Methods Using the method of epidemiological survey,TCM Constitution identification,blood metabolism index test and acupoint measurement using conductance method were conduc -ted in among the residents of a village of Nanhai District,Foshan.The correlation analysis was conducted using SPSS 18.0 statistic software.Results A total of 701 residents were investigated,among whom 627(92.30%)were with gentleness type,39(5.56%)with humid heat type and 35(2.14%)with phlegm and humid quality.Among them,cholesterol in-crease was revealed in 429 residents(61.20%),three acylglycerol increase in 200 residents(28.53%),blood uric acid increase in 249 residents(35.52%), and fasting blood glucose increase in 55 residents(7.85%).According to con-ductance method measurement,the most prominent deficiency type was in Sanjiao(166,23.7%); the most prominent empirical type was heat meridian(186,26.5%).Phlegm dampness was closely correlated with the increases of total cho-lesterol,high blood uric acid and fasting blood glucose;and damp heat and gentleness types were closely correlated with the increase of three acyl glycerin.Phlegm dampness was correlated with deficiency in spleen,stomach,lung,kidney and bladder meridians.Damp heat was correlated with the empirical in pericardium,small intestine,bladder,spleen meridian and gallbladder.Conclusion Damp heat and phlegm are differed in both metabolic parameters and actual measurement point conductivity distribution, it provides a reference for research, intervention and identification of diseases related to these two kinds of constitution.

title: Relationship between cardiovascular risk factors and traditional Chinese constitution in subjects with high-normal blood pressure
abstract: Objective: We explored the relationship between traditional Chinese constitution and risk factors for cardiovascular disease in subjects with high-normal blood pressure (BP). Methods: The traditional Chinese constitution of 80 subjects with high-normal BP was judged by questionnaires and interviews. Measurements of cardiovascular and metabolic health in- cluded BP, body weight, body mass index (BMI), low-density lipoprotein cholesterol (LDL-C), 2-hour oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT2h), and waist cir- cumference. Statistical relationships between cardiovascular disease risk factors and specific Chinese constitution were evaluated by univariate and multivariate analyses. Results: Ping He, Tan Shi, and Yin Xu were the dominant constitutions in subjects with high-normal blood pressure. There were significant differences in weight, LDL-C, BMI, OGTT2h, and waist circumference between Tan Shi and Ping He (P < 0.01), in SBP and OGTT2h between Yin Xu and Ping He (P < 0.05), and weight, BMI, waist circumference, SBP, and LDL-C between Tan Shi and Yin Xu constitutions (P < 0.01). Logistic regression found a strong association between the Tan Shi constitution and LDL-C in subjects with high-normal blood pressure. Conclusion: Ping He, Tan Shi, and Yin Xu are the principle traditional Chinese constitutions in subject with high-normal blood pressure. The Tan Shi constitution is associated with multiple risk factors for cardiovascular disease (LDL-C, BMI, body weight, and waist circumference), while OGTT2h is closely related to the Yin Xu constitution.

title: Pestilential differentiation
abstract: In integrative cardiovascular Chinese medicine, dry heat and damp heat are two pathogenic factors that affect and penetrate quickly through the wei qi level of the four levels to invade the interior body. Two disease conditions or events that manifest from dry heat or damp heat include are endocarditis and septic shock, which affect the cardiovascular system and quickly lead to heart failure in susceptible patients.
reason:

- Reason: While the paper connects damp heat to serious cardiovascular outcomes like endocarditis and septic shock, it fails to address any modifiable or chronic cardiovascular risk factors. Clinical determination of treatment and prevention based on differentiation of syndromes must be associated with weather-factors and constitution-factors.

title: Impact of season and constitution on lipid parameters
abstract: Ayurveda prescribes daily and seasonal regimen in maintaining good health. Measures in the preservation of health have been described considering one's own Prakriti, Satva, Vayas, Bala, Agni, Ojus, season, and so on. Depending on the relative predominance of Doshas in various constitutions and seasons, certain regimens have been prescribed. The present study was done to assess the lipid profile in 54 healthy volunteers. It was observed from the present data that winter month is one of the potential risk factors for cardiovascular diseases because more lipid profile level was observed during winter. Among the constitutions, Kapha and Pitta Prakriti are more vulnerable for cardiovascular diseases because more lipid profile level is observed in these constitutions during winter.
venue: AYU (An International Quarterly Journal of Research in Ayurveda)
reason:

The lack of TCM terminology and theoretical alignment renders the paper irrelevant despite partial overlap in topic (cardiovascular risk and lipids).

The link to cardiovascular risk is present but tied to non-TCM concepts. Partial relevance due to lipid profile analysis, but the core constitutional framework is mismatched.
